newsSince: No new material news since June 9. The catalyst the June 9 'up' verdict cited - the June 2 record Q3 FY26 print (sales $995.1M, adj EPS $1.06, raised FY26 organic guide to 3-5%), confirmed liquid-cooling wins, 20%+ disk-drive filtration growth, and the closed Facet acquisition - is all pre-June 9 and now in the base. The -0.7% move since June 9 is drift.

sources.label: Donaldson record Q3 FY26 results (June 2) - StockTitan 8-K

verdicts.rankRationale: On the strict latent-nodes lens the cooling/filtration pathway was upgraded June 9 on the June 2 print confirming actual data-center liquid-cooling wins and 20%+ disk-drive filtration growth. That catalyst is now in the base; no new evidence since June 9 and a -0.7% drift day. Hold the gain at 29; the thesis remains validated and uncrowded.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Confirmed data-center liquid-cooling OEM wins; disk-drive filtration +20%
verdicts.primaryRisk: Industrial Solutions softness; cooling is a small share of total revenue
verdicts.bull: Management-confirmed liquid-cooling wins and disk-drive filtration growth turn the latent thesis into a real one; -4.8% YTD, uncrowded.
verdicts.neutral: Validated but data-center is a modest slice of a broad filtration franchise; catalyst already played.
verdicts.bear: Industrial weakness and broad-cycle exposure dilute the AI-cooling signal in consolidated results.
